channel.title: Home on Cardboard Castle Club
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Cardboard Castle Club

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Cardboard Castle Club is a community-driven children’s theatre group for kids ages 6–16. We produce original plays, musicals, and variety shows — all written, designed, and performed by our incredible young members. And yes, our sets are mostly made of cardboard.

We believe that theatre isn’t just about what happens on stage. It’s about what happens inside a kid when they realize they can be brave, be loud, be silly, be someone else for a while — and then come back to themselves a little more confident than before.

item.title: Support Us
item.description:
Cardboard Castle Club is a nonprofit, volunteer-run organization. We keep our fees as low as possible so that no child is ever turned away. But costumes, supplies, lighting, and venue rentals add up fast — even when your sets are made of free boxes.

Your donation — no matter the size — helps us continue to provide a creative home for kids in our community. Every dollar goes directly to supporting our productions and programs.

item.title: The Crew
item.description: Every production is a team effort. From the directors who guide the vision to the kids who bring it to life — on stage and behind the scenes — here is the incredible crew behind The Kingdom of Nowhere.
